title: The Craft Aesthetics of Urushi Fountain Pens
subtitle: How lacquer depth and surface sheen transform writing experience
content:
# The Craft Aesthetics of Urushi Pens
Urushi is not just a coating, but a process of layering time and craftsmanship.

## Why Urushi
- Deep luster
- Tactile density
- A surface that matures beautifully over time

### Care Tips
Keep away from direct sunlight and wipe gently with a soft cloth after use.

title: A Guide to Modern Flex Nibs
subtitle: How to find classic flex behavior in modern production models
content:
# A Guide to Modern Flex Nibs
Pressure response and snapback are the key factors when choosing a flex nib.

## Checklist
- Line variation at minimal pressure
- Recovery speed
- Feed stability under long writing sessions

Top-tier models maintain consistent flow even during extended use.

title: Designing a Museum-Style Archive Layout
subtitle: Information architecture and curation for thousands of collection entries
content:
# Museum-Style Archive Layout
Archive UX is a balance between discoverability and context.

## Core Principles
- Prioritize large imagery
- Keep metadata placement consistent
- Reuse predictable interaction patterns

Consistent card structures significantly reduce long-term maintenance cost.
